interface.shortDescription: ModernUO and Ultima Online development guidance for RebirthUO.
interface.longDescription: ModernUO provides focused Codex skills for RebirthUO server work, including migration guidance, content parity checks, subsystem audits, serialization, timers, networking, regions, combat, crafting, loot, quests, housing, skills, stats, and related Ultima Online domain research.
defaultPrompt: Check this Ultima Online content parity.
